title: Royal Mess - The Poppy, the Paparazzi & the Public Entrance
summary: During Remembrance week, Prince Harry turned heads by wearing a poppy to reality star Kris Jenner's 70th birthday party, treating sacred military symbolism like a fashion accessory while his brother William honored veterans in Brazil. Victoria dissects how Harry and Meghan's paparazzi-friendly entrance at the Kardashian bash clashed with the solemn spirit of the occasion, while other royals maintained appropriate public distance. From the optics disaster of mixing commemoration with celebrity parties to the stark contrast in how the working royals approached the same weekend, this episode exposes the tone-deaf choices that keep fueling royal family tensions and public criticism.
